notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry reached on error

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Bobby Witt Jr. reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Kevin McGonigle plunked
notableEvents.detail: Kevin McGonigle hit by pitch. Zach McKinstry to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bobby Witt Jr. inside-the-park HR
